reviews.review_title: Went from 5 star to 1 but now back to 5
reviews.review_description: They finally fixed the game and can now have their 5 star reviews back. This game is a classic and truly funny that many can now enjoy again. Thank you devs for finally fixing it ❤️

Omg thank you for fixing this gem! I'm bloody addicted to it now. The writers definitely have a good sense of humour and you can tell through the delivery that the people who made this enjoyed doing so.

Happy the devs have responded about fixing this game. It's is so cool and funny and different - I recommend it to everyone who gets a quest - but I only recently learned about the bug as my first time playing this was on PC.

But it was so good that even though I'm without a PC I purchased it again on standalone just to have it on deck and see how it holds up but I couldn't get passed the initial bug to start playing!

I returned to this game to find I can't get past the start up menu, "Press any button to continue." I'm seeing many people have had the same issue. Do not buy until this problem is fixed. This was one of my favorite games. Disappointing.

reviews.review_title: Just bought, doesn't work on quest 2
reviews.review_description: Googled and apparently it's a known glitch (that it won't start the game gets stuck on a beginning menu) so now I'm trying to figure out if I can get a refund for them knowingly allowing purchases of a game that no longer functions.

reviews.review_title: An update to what I said
reviews.review_description: I've recently try to play this game again come to find out I can't it gives me the option of standing or sitting I pick standing then it tells me to press any button I press a button nothing so the devs need to fix this also while they're at it add in a new secret Zoo level
One of the best games on VR is back, always loved and replayed it, learned about bug, and was sad, but the last quest update fixed everything I guess or devs, in any case I am more than joyful!!!!
fun game
I thought I was the problem and uninstalled and reinstalled millions of times, deleted all my data, reset my headset, FACTORY RESET my headset, and it turns out it's just the game not working...
I love this now that they have fixed it it’s so like Rick and Morty
The devs started responding a month ago and still haven't fixed the game. It legitimately doesn't take this long to fix "press any button to play." At this point people should just report the game.

reviews.review_title: Game is bugged from the start
reviews.review_description: When you open the game you have the choice between standing and sitting mode. After it tells you “press any key to continue” and not one button works. Please fix asap. After I will change the review.

reviews.review_title: How to get past the press any button
reviews.review_description:
Get a bluetooth or normal mouse. (If its not usb-c get an adapter it worked for me) lauch the game.
Now when you see the press any button click on your mouse. Now you can play the game.
It’s finally fixed!  Now we can get past the “press any button” screen and find that hidden zoo level!  Hooray!

reviews.review_title: Can’t get past the press any button😢
reviews.review_description: This was a really cool game I went to show it to my friends and I can’t get past the press any button screen, i was looking everywhere for a solution because I know my friend would love it and found the reviews, everyone else is having the same problems would love for a fix!!

Yeah same problem as everyone else, I did find though on Reddit that according to one of the developers of the game via the Crows Crows Crows discord that they are aware of the problem and are actively working on a fix
A true VR cult classic.

I used to love this game so much, but now I can’t get past the loading screen. It says to press any button to continue but I can’t seem to get it to work. As of now this is still and issue and a lot of other people are experiencing it too. I read another review saying you can play if you connnect a Bluetooth device to use as a button. I connected my keyboard and ps5 controller as a last effort but I can’t get past the loading screen. Please fix your game. It was really good and I will change my rating to 5 stars if it works again.

developer_response.body: We're working on a fix for this issue! Thanks for your patience :)

reviews.review_description: same as everyone else bought the game and cant get by the press any button to start needs to be fixed
Yay
get a bluetooth mouse and pair it and it'll work you shouldn't have to do this but if you really wanna play the game there you go
After choosing sit or stand option i am stuck at the "push any button to continue" how can I resolve this issue? For Quest2

DO NOT BUY THIS.
IT IS BROKEN.
THE DEVS HAVE NO PLANS ON FIXING TNE GAME.
DO NOT BUY THIS.
THE GAME WILL NOT RUN.

As evreyone else listed the game does not move past the first "push any button to continue" screen. I emailed both the Publisher and the Devs with not yet a response. Meta doesn't have a reporting button as far as i could tell so I am writing this review. If this is not the Devs or the Publishers issue, but a Meta hardware compatibility issue, Meta should immediately resolve this. If it is a software issue then the Dev/Publishers should immediately resolve this. Meta should reach out to them ASAP to avoid all these refunds. Meta is literally selling a game that does not operate on the store, quite scammy. If it doesnt operate issue some refunds and take it off. Its not like a "quality of life" issue or a minor discrepancy. The Game is not Working it can not be played. Fix or remove it, months of comments have reported this issue. Literally insane that no one from Meta went "hmmm somethings wrong here". Your screwin folks
Freezes on page to start game and won’t budge. Not had chance to play. Very disappointing.

reviews.review_title: OKAY ANOTHER GUY FIGURED THIS OUT
reviews.review_description: So you need a Bluetooth mouse to play it on headset. AND IT WORKED SO SHOUT OUT TO THAT GUY
I got this game a long time ago and absolutely loved it and went back to play and never could get into the game very sad this was one of my favs

developer_response.body: We're working on a fix for this issue! Thanks for your patience :)

reviews.review_description:
Game is fun.  The other reviews are correct in that it is hard (nearly impossible) to start but I am here to tell you a way to get into the game.  You need a Bluetooth mouse  and pair it to the headset.  Clicking the mouse will get past the screen that everyone is getting stuck on.   Once in game ... everything works just fine with quest controllers.

3 Stars because of this dumb issue but I hope people find this review and can enjoy a game they purchased.
Fix this game
Stoked to play but cannot pass the screen telling you to press any button to continue.
